security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.
The system does not have rate limiting on votes to mitigate against denial-of-service attacks

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication, role validation, and rate limiting.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote message could be altered in transit.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not protect against vote tampering.

assumptions: The communication channel between the user and the governance contract is insecure.
The governance contract does not verify the integrity of the vote message.
The actor can intercept and modify the vote message without detection

mitigation.strategy: Implement message authentication using digital signatures and secure communication channels.

description: An attacker may alter a user's vote before it reaches the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: The system does not record vote origins.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks mechanisms for vote traceability.

assumptions: The governance contract does not record the source IP address of the vote.
The system does not implement a secure logging mechanism to trace votes.

mitigation.strategy: Implement secure logging and audit trails for vote submissions.  Utilize cryptographically verifiable vote receipts.

description: An attacker can cast votes without leaving a verifiable trace.

security_gap.gap_description: The governance contract may be vulnerable to flooding attacks.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: No rate limiting is present on vote submissions.

assumptions: The governance contract does not implement rate limiting or other denial-of-service protections.
The actor can submit a large number of requests in a short amount of time.
The system is not designed to handle high volumes of requests

mitigation.strategy: Implement rate limiting and other denial-of-service countermeasures.

description: An attacker may flood the governance contract with requests, making it unavailable.
